title: Surgeon Vacancy at Indraprastha Apollo - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Indraprastha Apollo - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Indraprastha Apollo. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Surgeon to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About Indraprastha Apollo:
Indraprastha Apollo is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indraprastha Apollo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
